goals.title: Phase 1 — Config and target model
goals.objective: Implement schemaVersion: 1 config, safe migration from the current .screenslop/config.json shape, target resolution helpers, init wizard/flags, simulator-free config tests, docs alignment for artifactsDir, and required Phase 1 verification from the approved plan.
goals.evidence: Committed and pushed Phase 1 config schema at 9fb85b6. Evidence: node --check bin/screenslop.mjs plus all src/tests/scripts passed; npm test passed 72/72; smoke:e2e fixed passed; doctor passed; cleanup dry-run clean; reviewer APPROVE after blocker fixes; HEAD matches origin/main 9fb85b6.

goals.title: Phase 2 — Shared runtime smoke runner and user-app dogfood path
goals.objective: Extract reusable build/run target orchestration, keep the sample runtime smoke, add configured-target smoke support, preserve JSON stage failures, add negative fresh-capture/fresh-critique tests, and verify with runtime smoke when available.
goals.evidence: Committed and pushed Phase 2 configured runtime smoke target at 0fed772. Evidence: node --check bin/screenslop.mjs plus all src/tests/scripts passed; npm test passed 77/77; smoke:e2e fixed passed; doctor passed; cleanup dry-run clean; npm run smoke:runtime passed with verified-fixed runtime evidence; reviewer blockers fixed with target-config validation and report path redaction tests.

goals.title: Phase 3 — Matrix MVP
goals.objective: Replace the matrix placeholder with a real bounded six-cell matrix report, preserve unavailable/failure evidence per cell including no-config behavior, write linked evidence bundles, and feed profile needs back into the provisional config schema.
goals.evidence: Committed and pushed Phase 3 matrix MVP at 22832bc. Evidence: matrix command now writes a six-cell report and linked evidence bundles; no-config cells are explicit unavailable evidence; configured dry-run and live path are covered by tests; node --check all mjs passed; npm test passed 80/80; smoke:e2e fixed passed; matrix dry-run/profile JSON smoke passed; doctor passed; cleanup dry-run clean.

goals.title: Phase 4 — Agent contract and docs/schema release polish
goals.objective: Update the Screenslop skill, session handoff, command docs, architecture docs, agent integration docs, schemas, README, JSON examples, release checklist, and known limitations so they match shipped behavior.
goals.evidence: Committed and pushed Phase 4 docs/schema/agent polish at c168bce. Evidence: README, session handoff, repo strategy, skill, schemas, JSON examples, known limitations, and release checklist now match shipped init/see/critique/fix/verify/matrix behavior; node --check passed; npm test passed 80/80; smoke:e2e fixed passed; matrix dry-run/profile JSON smoke passed; doctor passed; cleanup dry-run clean.

goals.title: Phase 5 — Release boundary and packaging check
goals.objective: Resolve flat-layout/package migration policy, reconcile repo-strategy drift, handle public apps/mac or Studio-shaped placeholders, freeze or document config schema instability, run npm package smoke, and tag only after all gates pass.
goals.evidence: Committed and pushed final v0 release-boundary seam fix at 600381f. Evidence: configured artifactsDir is consumed by see and matrix; invalid config no longer silently falls back; config policy docs are consistent; code-reviewer APPROVE; architect CLEAR; node --check all mjs passed; npm test passed 83/83; smoke:e2e fixed passed; matrix dry/profile JSON passed; npm pack dry-run passed; doctor passed; cleanup dry-run found no sidecars; smoke:runtime passed verified-fixed with report artifacts/runtime-smoke-2026-06-08T13-49-41-383Z.json; extracted package smoke and npm test passed 83/83.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
